items.headline: Is Allstate’s (ALL) Shift Toward Private Assets Reframing Its Growth Story Amid Auto Headwinds?
items.summary: In recent days, Allstate was downgraded by Keefe, Bruyette & Woods on concerns about slowing growth in personal auto insurance and rising competition, alongside US$8.40 million of insider share sales over three months. At the same time, Allstate reported US$2.40 billion in Q1 2026 net income and has increased its allocation to private assets, highlighting a shift in how it builds returns beyond traditional underwriting.
